utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified as required: 1) health_coverage: The format asks for physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists physical_health and mental_health with plan names and monthly costs, plus a total_health_cost. Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: The format asks for home/contents insurance with costs. The plan includes home_contents with cost and coverage amount, plus specified add-ons (golf equipment, wine collection) with costs and values, and a total_property_cost. This satisfies home/contents with costs (and even adds extras). Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: The format asks for travel insurance with costs. The plan lists three travel coverages with plan names, contexts, and monthly costs, plus total_travel_cost. Fully specified. 4) additional_services: The format asks for any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists multiple services each with monthly cost and a total_additional_cost. Fully specified. 5) total_budget: The format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan gives monthly_cost and annual_cost, and even includes current_cost, annual_savings, cost_reduction, and a note on coverage enhancement. The required elements (monthly and annual breakdown) are present. Fully specified. Therefore, 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Map each item named in the final coverage plan to the exact matching option in the ground-truth list and return its rating. Items found: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) rating 8; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) rating 8; PrimeHome Premium Coverage rating 10; Golf Equipment Add-on and Wine Collection Protection are not present in ground-truth property_protection list, so they cannot be mapped; PrimeTravel Premium corresponds to PrimeTravel Premium Plan rating 10; LifeFirst Standard Travel corresponds to LifeFirst Standard Plan in travel_insurance rating 7; InsurePlus Standard corresponds to InsurePlus Standard Plan in travel_insurance rating 6. Additional services: Telemedicine matches Telemedicine Services rating 10; Executive wellness likely corresponds to Wellness Programs rating 10; Travel assistance matches 24/7 Travel Assistance rating 10; Premium membership matches Premium Insurance Membership rating 10; Business travel support matches Business Travel Support rating 10.
